# Blockquotes

## Simple Blockquote

> This is a blockquote. It should be visually distinct from regular paragraph text.

## Multi-line Blockquote

> This blockquote spans multiple lines. It should wrap correctly and maintain
> consistent styling across the entire block. The left border or indent should
> be visible throughout.

## Blockquote with Formatting

> **Important:** This blockquote contains **bold**, *italic*, and `code` formatting.
> All inline styles should render correctly inside a blockquote.

## Nested Blockquote

> Outer blockquote.
>
> > Inner nested blockquote. This tests nested quoting depth.
>
> Back to outer level.

## Blockquote with List

> Key takeaways:
>
> - First point
> - Second point
> - Third point
